---
title: "TidyTuesday Collection 2024–2026"
description: "Weekly data visualisation challenges — static ggplot2 charts and interactive Shiny versions for selected weeks, covering economics, science, culture, and sports datasets."
author: "Pawan Jangra"
date: "2024-01-01"
categories: [TidyTuesday, ggplot2, Shiny, Data Viz]
image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1543286386-713bdd548da4?w=600&q=80"
---

**GitHub:** [github.com/pawan1198](https://github.com/pawan1198)

**Tools used:** R, ggplot2, ggiraph, Shiny, patchwork, data.table
